political.s: Tillamook does not engage in federal lobbying. Individual members have made modest political contributions to both parties and industry PACs. The organization itself does not contribute to political candidates or campaigns.

charity.s: Tillamook commits 4% of net income to community giving, focusing on agricultural advocacy, food security, and healthful children. The company donates thousands of pounds of products annually to food banks and organizations supporting farmers.
charity.amt: ~4% of net income (estimated $30-50M+ annually based on revenue)
charity.focus: Agricultural advocacy, food security, healthful children

environment.s: Certified B Corporation with comprehensive climate action plan targeting net-zero by 2050 and 30% emissions reduction by 2030. Implements regenerative agriculture practices, renewable energy (85% currently), manure digesters converting waste to renewable energy, and partnerships with environmental organizations.

labor.s: Teamsters Local 58 represents production workers; union voted 111-91 to remain unionized in 2022. Company has union-free workforce components and mixed employee reviews on Glassdoor regarding work environment, morale, and management responsiveness. Employs 900+ in Oregon.

dei.s: Company emphasizes welcoming culture and inclusive workplace. Does not exclude organizations based on DEI commitments; focuses donations on causes aligned with agricultural and food security missions rather than explicit DEI initiatives.

animals.s: Dairy cooperative; phased out rBST (bovine growth hormone) across supplier base in 2005 following consumer concerns. Animal welfare standards applied to supplier farms but specific cruelty-free certifications not indicated.

guns.s: Dairy and food manufacturing company with no connection to firearms industry.

privacy.s: Not disclosed. No prominent privacy policy violations documented; standard e-commerce data practices typical for food brands.

execPay.s: Not disclosed. As a private cooperative, executive compensation data not publicly available. Company emphasizes farmer-owner benefits and employee compensation but specific CEO-to-worker ratios not disclosed.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
